tasks.description: Mastra instance and workflow — PostgresStore, Memory, agentChatWorkflow, observability
steps: Create Mastra instance in apps/api/src/mastra/instance.ts with PostgresStore, default agent, storage
Add chatMemory (Memory with storage, lastMessages: 20)
Create agentChatWorkflow in workflows/agent-chat.workflow.ts: single step that gets agent by key, calls agent.stream(messages, memory), pipes fullStream to writer
Register agentChatWorkflow in Mastra config; add Observability with DefaultExporter

tasks.description: MastraService — bootstrap load agents from DB, register/unregister, ephemeral agents, getWorkflow, getChatMemory
steps: Implement MastraService: OnApplicationBootstrap selects mastra-source agents from DB, registerAgent each via createRuntimeAgent + mastra.addAgent
Implement registerAgent, unregisterAgent, getAgent; registerEphemeralAgent / unregisterEphemeralAgent for per-request keys
Expose getChatMemory(), getWorkflow('agentChatWorkflow'), listRegistered()
Register MastraModule as Global with MastraService

tasks.description: Runtime agent builder with system prompt, tools, and memory support
steps: Update createRuntimeAgent in apps/api/src/mastra/runtime.ts to accept optional tools (ToolsInput) and memory (Memory)
Build system prompt from agent name, description, instructions; pass tools and memory into Agent constructor

tasks.description: AgentChatService — stream chat via workflow with tools and ephemeral agent
steps: Create AgentChatService: streamChat(agentId, messages, userId) loads agent from AgentsService, builds tools via ToolRegistryService.buildToolsForAgent(agentId, userId)

Create runtime agent with createRuntimeAgent(record, tools, memory), register ephemeral via MastraService, get agentChatWorkflow, createRun with resourceId userId, run.stream() with inputData (agentKey, messages, userId, agentId, threadId)
Return workflowStream and ephemeralKey; implement cleanupEphemeral(key)

tasks.description: Agent chat controller — POST /agents/:id/chat with AI SDK UI message stream
steps: AgentChatController: POST :id/chat with Body messages, Session user

Call chatService.streamChat(id, dto.messages, session.user.id); createUIMessageStream with execute that pipes toAISdkStream(workflowStream, { from: 'workflow' }) to writer, then cleanupEphemeral in finally
pipeUIMessageStreamToResponse(response, uiStream)

tasks.description: ToolRegistryService — userId-aware buildToolsForAgent for per-user credentials
steps: Update buildToolsForAgent(agentId, userId) in tool-registry.service.ts to accept userId and pass to credential/token lookups where needed
Ensure executeToolAction and tool execute callbacks use userId for OAuth and API key resolution

tasks.description: Activity module — in-memory events and GET /activity
steps: Create ActivityService: in-memory Map of userId → ActivityEvent[]; addEvent(userId, { type, agentName, timestamp }), getEvents(userId); cap at 50 events per user
Create ActivityController: GET /activity returns activityService.getEvents(session.user.id)
Create ActivityModule; add ActivityModule to AppModule
Add ActivityEvent type to packages/shared (id, type: agent_created | agent_tested, agentName, timestamp); export from shared index

tasks.description: Integrate activity events into agent create and preview test
steps: Inject ActivityService in AgentsService; on createAgent success call activityService.addEvent(userId, { type: 'agent_created', agentName: dto.name, timestamp })
Inject ActivityService in AgentPreviewService; on stream call activityService.addEvent(userId, { type: 'agent_tested', agentName, timestamp })

tasks.description: Shared tool types — TOOL_CAPABILITIES and ActivityEvent export
steps: Add TOOL_CAPABILITIES record (github, gmail, web_search capability lists) to packages/shared/src/types/tool.ts
Export ActivityEvent from packages/shared/src/types/api.ts and re-export Tool types and ActivityEvent from packages/shared/src/index.ts

tasks.description: Tools marketplace page — listToolsWithStatus, status badges, ToolDetailDialog
steps: Update apps/web tools page to use api.listToolsWithStatus() for connection status
Add status badges per tool (Connected / Not Connected / API Key Required / Configured) and category colors
Add ToolDetailDialog component: tool details, TOOL_CAPABILITIES, OAuth status fetch, connect/disconnect/configure actions
Wire tool card click to open ToolDetailDialog; pass onConnect, onDisconnect, onConfigureApiKey, isDisconnecting
